response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical credentials with 15+ years of senior-level software development experience and demonstrated ability to learn diverse technologies, but the position explicitly requires team leadership, IT architecture focus, and German language proficiency (C1) that are not clearly evident in the resume. While his open-source contributions and senior titles suggest technical depth, the absence of explicit team management experience, architectural leadership, security/compliance emphasis, and UML expertise—combined with German listed as only 'Basic'—represent significant gaps for a Head of Development role.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software development background across multiple domains, languages, and architectural contexts
Proven ability to rapidly learn and master diverse technical stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang, C++, AWS CDK)
Active open-source contributor with successful platform projects (GISCollective) demonstrating design and architecture thinking
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading, mentoring, or managing technical teams—critical for executive-level Head of Development role
German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' but role requires C1 level minimum
Resume lacks emphasis on IT architecture decisions, security/compliance considerations, UML expertise, and requirements management
